scope: LK OS Phase 8 operational automation registry after mandatory Daily/Weekly correction

plain_language.p0: Urgente hoje; pode exigir ação no mesmo dia.
plain_language.p1: Importante acompanhar/decidir; não é necessariamente incêndio.
plain_language.delivery_rule: Daily e Weekly são enviados sempre na cadência aprovada; P0/P1 só priorizam a leitura.

automations.name: Daily Sales Brief read-only mandatory delivery
automations.contract: Always deliver the generated daily report; P0/P1 only prioritize content.
automations.next_gate: Monitor first scheduled delivery on 2026-05-12 08:00 BRT.

automations.name: Weekly CEO Review read-only mandatory delivery
automations.contract: Always deliver the generated weekly report; P0/P1 only prioritize content.
automations.next_gate: Monitor first scheduled delivery on 2026-05-18 09:00 BRT.

automations.name: SEO/CRO weekly Claude SEO improvement loop
automations.contract: Generate read-only SEO/CRO queue and previews; writes require explicit approval.
automations.next_gate: Keep as read-only preview loop; do not auto-apply Shopify/Merchant/theme changes.

automations.name: Approval Learning Ledger refresh
automations.contract: Regenerate after meaningful decisions; do not auto-approve or auto-execute.
automations.rollback: revert ledger PR or regenerate from source artifacts.
automations.next_gate: Stay manual until pattern stabilizes; possible post-PR hook later with separate approval.

automations.name: Klaviyo CRM draft watcher
automations.contract: No send/schedule; only readiness and risk packet with verified IDs/links.
automations.rollback: no recurring job exists; discard/supersede readiness packet.
automations.next_gate: Needs Klaviyo read-only implementation and explicit Lucas approval.

automations.name: On-demand sourcing router
automations.contract: Run only for named approved item; no full-sync, supplier contact, purchase, price or stock write.
automations.rollback: no recurring job exists; cancel before contact/purchase.
automations.next_gate: Needs explicit Lucas/Júlio approval per item and real lead-time/cost parameters.
